task.title: Enforce task/sprint boundary semantics
task.summary: Make CodeWiki treat tasks as self-contained executable work and sprints as the only grouping unit, then prevent container tasks from becoming next work or passing validation.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki enforces self-contained task boundaries and keeps sprint grouping separate from executable task work.
acceptance: Skill guidance defines task as self-contained executable work and sprint as related-task cluster, with container tasks forbidden.
Validation guidance requires other-agent validators to block container tasks and closure criteria that mostly close other tasks.
Roadmap mutation/preflight logic rejects or blocks active container tasks before they become normal executable work.
State and resume routing skip non-executable tasks and select concrete tasks instead.
Existing TASK-077 umbrella state is removed from active executable sprint work or marked superseded by SPRINT-003.
non_goals: Do not build a full sprint mutation API in this task.
Do not redesign all roadmap schema fields beyond task/sprint boundary enforcement.
Do not require tasks touching the same file to be impossible; only overlapping ownership without clear boundaries is forbidden.

exit_criteria: Boundary contract documented in skill and KB.
Roadmap mutation/preflight rejects active container tasks.
TASK-077 no longer active next work.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Validator must independently check implementation from committed or digested content.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

requirements.text: Tasks are self-contained executable work, not grouping units.
Resume/state routing selects executable tasks only.
TASK-077 leaves active executable sprint work.

summary: Implemented task/sprint boundary enforcement so container tasks are rejected or skipped and validation guidance blocks umbrella tasks.

evidence: tests/smoke/resume-scheduler.test.mjs covers explicit rejection of container tasks, implicit skipping of umbrella/container tasks, and delegated acceptance criteria based on other TASK closure.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/task-boundary.ts centralizes boundary assessment; roadmap mutation, lint, state, and resume consumers use it.
notes: Generated/runtime graph and task views refreshed through codewiki_state refresh.
TASK-077 remains in retained cancelled task view/history but is no longer active next work or SPRINT-003 executable member.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: tests/smoke/resume-scheduler.test.mjs covers explicit rejection of container tasks, implicit skipping of umbrella/container tasks, and delegated acceptance criteria based on other TASK closure.
code_change_evidence: src/application/task-boundary.ts centralizes boundary assessment; roadmap mutation, lint, state, and resume consumers use it.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Skill guidance defines task as self-contained executable work and sprint as related-task cluster, with container tasks forbidden.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated skills/codewiki/SKILL.md, skills/codewiki/loops/implementation.md, skills/codewiki/prompts/resume-implementation.md, and .codewiki/kb/system/roadmap.md with explicit task boundary contract.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Validation guidance requires other-agent validators to block container tasks and closure criteria that mostly close other tasks.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated skills/codewiki/loops/validation.md and .codewiki/kb/system/validation-gateway.md with task boundary gate and block conditions.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Roadmap mutation/preflight logic rejects or blocks active container tasks before they become normal executable work.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added src/application/task-boundary.ts and integrated assert/preflight checks into src/application/roadmap.ts plus lint error roadmap-container-task in src/application/lint.ts.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: State and resume routing skip non-executable tasks and select concrete tasks instead.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated src/application/state-builders.ts to expose executable/container task views and use executable ids for next actions; updated src/adapters/pi/commands/resume.ts to reject explicit container resumes and skip implicit container candidates.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Existing TASK-077 umbrella state is removed from active executable sprint work or marked superseded by SPRINT-003.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Cancelled TASK-077 as superseded, created TASK-089, and updated SPRINT-003 task_ids to remove TASK-077 and include TASK-089 in .codewiki/roadmap/queue.json.

closure_brief.user_intent: Prevent umbrella/container tasks like TASK-077 from becoming executable roadmap tasks; tasks must be self-contained units and sprints must cluster related tasks.
implemented_changes: Added task-boundary assessment helper and enforced it in roadmap mutation/preflight, lint, state next-action routing, and resume command selection.
Updated CodeWiki skill and validation docs to define task/sprint semantics and block container-task misuse.
Cleaned current roadmap by cancelling TASK-077 as superseded and moving concrete enforcement to TASK-089 inside SPRINT-003.
acceptance_evidence: Skill and KB docs define self-contained task and sprint cluster semantics.
Validation docs block container tasks and acceptance mostly delegated to other tasks.
Roadmap mutation/preflight, lint, state, and resume selection consume boundary assessment.
TASK-077 cancelled as superseded by SPRINT-003 and TASK-089 now owns enforcement.
non_goals_preserved: No full sprint mutation API added.
No roadmap schema redesign beyond boundary metadata in state views.
Shared file paths remain allowed when ownership does not overlap.
remaining_risks: Detection patterns may need future tuning for edge-case wording.

risks: Container detection is deterministic and conservative; future false positives should refine task-boundary patterns rather than weaken validation policy.

restore.note: Restored history is reference material until promoted into active knowledge or roadmap truth.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: feat(codewiki): enforce task sprint boundaries
commit.body: Define tasks as self-contained executable work and sprints as grouping clusters. Reject or skip container tasks during roadmap mutation, validation preflight, state next-action routing, and resume selection. Cancel TASK-077 as superseded by SPRINT-003 and move concrete enforcement to TASK-089.
trailers: CodeWiki-Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/resume-scheduler.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke, npm test
commit.validation_ref_policy: replace <pending-validation> with validation report ref before commit

pr.title: feat(codewiki): enforce task sprint boundaries
pr.body: Define tasks as self-contained executable work and sprints as grouping clusters. Reject or skip container tasks during roadmap mutation, validation preflight, state next-action routing, and resume selection. Cancel TASK-077 as superseded by SPRINT-003 and move concrete enforcement to TASK-089.
